## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check:all` passes (typecheck + lint + test + rust)
- [ ] New/changed functionality has tests
- [ ] No new lint warnings or dead code (knip)
- [ ] Architecture constraints respected (see [docs/conventions.md](docs/conventions.md))
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` or `docs/` updated if behavior or conventions changed
